restaurant_menu.title: Caesar Salad
restaurant_menu.description: Chef Athmane's Caesar Salad. Crisp, fresh Romaine lettuce from my home organic garden, tossed in a creamy homemade Caesar dressing. Enhanced with Mediterranean anchovies, freshly aged shaved Parmesan, and crunchy sourdough croutons — every bite is a perfect balance of flavor and texture.

restaurant_menu.title: Duck Breast
restaurant_menu.description: Chef Athmane's Duck Breast. Medium-rare, pan-seared duck breast served with almond-infused sweet potato and finished with a rich cranberry, red wine, and cacao jus — a perfect balance of savory, sweet, and indulgent flavors.

restaurant_menu.title: Sea Scallops
restaurant_menu.description: Chef Athmane's Sea Scallops. Perfectly pan-seared sea scallops, drizzled with a delicate truffle, soy, and ginger dressing, and topped with golden albino caviar. A dish worthy of a 3-Michelin-star dining experience.

restaurant_menu.title: A5 Wagyu Medallion
restaurant_menu.description: Chef Athmane's A5 Wagyu Medallion. Succulent A5 Wagyu medallions, paired with caramelized shallots in aged balsamic glace, organic baby carrots, and a velvety peach purée, all finished with a 24-hour slow-reduced yuzu jus — a harmony of richness, sweetness, and citrus elegance.

restaurant_menu.title: Gorgonzola Linguini
restaurant_menu.description: Chef Athmane's Gorgonzola Dolce & Organic Garden Baby Zucchini. Homemade fresh linguini tossed in a rich 6-month aged Gorgonzola sauce, accompanied by roasted organic baby yellow and green zucchini and delicate zucchini purée. Finished with stuffed zucchini flowers filled with a seasoned Gorgonzola mousse — a celebration of freshness, creaminess, and refined flavor.
